Mask up. Read. Guess.
‹
How to play
Setup
Type who you want to be, then pass the phone. Once everyone is in, generate the story.
The Interrogation
One reads the story aloud twice and starts asking: "Are you … ?"
Correct guess: You are out.
Wrong guess: It's your turn to guess.
The Victory
The last player standing wins!
Got it

Fake it, till they guess it
Who do you wannabe tonight? Fake the fame and crash the most exclusive celebrity party of the year. Just don't get caught. Guess who is who and unmask the wannabes before they blow your cover.
How to play
‹
New worlds. Same old lies.
Crash the craziest places on Earth—and beyond. Slip into legendary roles and blend into chaotic everyday scenarios. Different worlds, same goal: Guess who is who and unmask the wannabes before they blow your cover.
How to play
‹
Last Ticket Out
Noah's Ark is nearly full. Only one final seat remains on the ultimate cruise. Which bizarre creature will snag the last ticket? Decode the animals clues, unmask your opponents and claim your spot before the storm hits!
How to play
‹
Who ordered this disaster?!
Welcome to the kitchen of pure madness. Chocolate soup? Tomato cake? Decode the messy orders, trace the chaotic dishes back to their rightful foodies' hands, and claim your perfect meal before the kitchen closes!
How to play
‹
You are never alone
Every player hides a dark double life, locked in a battle between Jekyll and Hyde. Hunt their secrets down one by one, or risk exposing two faces at once. Unmask the dual alter egos of your rivals and guard your own inner monster.
How to play
‹
Unmask the rival rooster
Two teams face off, but every player is a double mystery: their identity and which team they are on. Call your play: draft their name or sack their loyalty. Guess all rival names to win the game for your team!

the story?
Drumroll! And the winner is ...
Your price? Click that button below, read the story out loud twice and fire off the first question. Of course, you can legally pass your interrogation rights to any person.
